overall.description: A first-person exploration of a gothic-style common room with high vaulted ceilings, arched windows, and blue celestial decor. The player character walks through the space observing ornate furniture, a central fireplace, towering bookshelves, and NPC students studying in various areas.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal ornate domed ceiling and iron chandelier

tall pointed arch windows with diamond lattice panes

circular glass dome ceiling with decorative stone trim

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a grand gothic common room with a white marble statue and tall arched windows. The camera walks forward then tilts up to reveal an ornate iron chandelier hanging from a domed skylight, showcasing the room's impressive vertical architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room seating area by tall windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the main seating area toward the window side of the room

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on green sofa reading a book

entered.detail: antique terrestrial globe on ornate brass stand
upholstered green sofa with wooden frame
tall wooden harp with strings near the windows
low six-sided wooden table with decorative inlay

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the common room, the camera passes a student reading on a green velvet sofa. The space features a brass globe stand, a wooden harp, and sunlight streaming through the tall gothic windows onto the blue celestial carpet.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor to inner fireplace chamber

events.description: passes through stone archway into the circular fireplace room

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway into the inner chamber with the central fireplace

entered.detail: large pointed stone arch with decorative molding
tall wooden grandfather clock with brass face
large circular stone fireplace with multiple openings
heavy blue fabric curtains with gold trim

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a stone archway, transitioning from the carpeted main hall to a wooden-floored corridor. Ahead, the large central fireplace structure becomes visible, framed by blue drapes and flanked by a grandfather clock.

events.description: camera circles around the large central fireplace structure

agents.ego_description: circling the large central fireplace and examining the seating arrangements around it

entered.detail: dark leather reading chair with high back
round rug with blue border and cream center
tall pile of leather-bound books on small stool

segments.scene_description: In the circular fireplace room, the camera circles the large stone hearth with its burning fire. The space features stone tile flooring, a leather armchair, and circular rugs, with warm firelight mixing with natural light from high windows.

agents.ego_description: approaching the tall bookshelves and examining the study area with desk and ladder

notable_agents.action: student sitting at wooden desk reading in front of bookshelf

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling dark wood shelves filled with leather books
small wooden writing desk with chair
brass hourglass on bookshelf
wooden rolling ladder leaning against tall shelves

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a quiet study area dominated by towering wooden bookshelves filled with volumes. A student sits reading at a desk, while a wooden ladder leans against the shelves. An hourglass and stacked books decorate the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: window study area with art easel and house emblem

events.description: camera turns to reveal large eagle mural illuminated by bright window light

agents.ego_description: walking past study desks and an art easel toward the large eagle mural on the wall

notable_agents.action: student sitting in green armchair near the window

entered.detail: wooden painting easel with canvas
small table with paint tubes, brushes, and feather quills
wooden desk with brass telescope pointing toward window
large wall painting of spread-winged eagle above sofa

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a bright study area by the windows with an art easel and painting supplies. The camera passes a student in an armchair and ends focused on a large eagle mural painted on the far wall, illuminated by natural light streaming through the gothic windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic common room that transitions from a bright, airy hall into a cozy, firelit circular chamber. It begins by passing a white marble statue and tilting upward to reveal an ornate iron chandelier suspended from a domed skylight. As the camera moves deeper into the space, it glides past a student on a green velvet sofa and a brass globe, with sunlight streaming across a blue celestial carpet. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through a stone archway, moving from the carpeted hall onto wooden floors toward a large central fireplace framed by blue drapes and a grandfather clock. Finally, the movement circles the stone hearth of the fireplace room, where the cool natural light from high windows blends with the warm glow of a burning fire reflecting off leather armchairs and circular rugs.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, scholarly nook into a bright, art-filled study area. It begins by gliding into a quiet space dominated by towering wooden bookshelves, passing a student reading at a desk beside a leaning ladder and an hourglass. As the camera moves forward, the dim interior gives way to a more open area where natural light begins to flood the room. The scene then expands toward the gothic windows, passing a student resting in an armchair and an art easel equipped with painting supplies. Finally, the movement culminates in a focused view of a large eagle mural painted on the far wall, brilliantly illuminated by the streaming sunlight.
